name: animated-number
description: Smoothly animates between numeric values using React Native Animated. Useful for counters, prices, and scores.

props.name: value
props.description: Target numeric value; the component smoothly animates to this number.

props.name: duration
props.description: Animation duration in milliseconds; defaults to the theme slow duration token.

props.name: formatter
props.description: Function that formats the interpolated value to a display string; defaults to Math.round.

props.name: variant
props.description: Typography variant used to render the animated text.

props.name: style
props.description: Additional text style applied to the number.

props.name: color
props.description: Text color token passed to the underlying Text component.
